        "content": "\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n<meta charset=\"UTF-8\" />\n<meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width,initial-scale=1\" />\n<title>EchoDraft Phase 5 \u2014 Final Audit</title>\n<style>\n*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}\nbody{font-family:-apple-system,\"Segoe UI\",system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:14px;line-height:1.6;background:#fff;color:#1f2328;padding:32px 16px 64px}\n.page{max-width:780px;margin:0 auto}\nh1{font-size:20px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px}\n.subtitle{color:#57606a;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:24px}\nh2{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;padding-bottom:6px;border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb;margin-top:32px}\n\n.scores{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:24px}\n.score-cell{background:#f7f8fa;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;text-align:center}\n.score-val{font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:#1a7f37}\n.score-lbl{font-size:11px;color:#57606a;margin-top:2px}\n\n.badge{display:inline-block;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:4px;text-transform:uppercase;vertical-align:middle}\n.fixed{background:#e6f4ea;color:#1a7f37}\n.low  {background:#f3f4f6;color:#57606a}\n.warn {background:#fff3cd;color:#7d4e00}\n.info {background:#ddf4ff;color:#0550ae}\n.pass {background:#e6f4ea;color:#1a7f37}\n\n.banner{background:#e6f4ea;border:1px solid #a8d5b5;border-radius:8px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:24px;font-size:13px}\n.banner strong{color:#1a7f37}\n\n.finding{border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:10px;overflow:hidden}\n.finding-head{padding:10px 14px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;background:#f7f8fa;border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb}\n.finding-title{font-weight:600;font-size:13px;flex:1}\n.finding-body{padding:12px 14px;font-size:13px}\n.finding-body p{margin-bottom:6px}\n.finding-body p:last-child{margin-bottom:0}\n.finding-body code{background:#f6f8fa;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px;font-size:12px;font-family:\"Cascadia Code\",\"Fira Mono\",monospace}\n.meta{font-size:11px;color:#57606a;font-family:\"Cascadia Code\",\"Fira Mono\",monospace;margin-top:6px}\n\ntable{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:13px;margin-top:8px}\nth{text-align:left;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;color:#57606a;padding:6px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb}\ntd{padding:7px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid #f0f0f0;vertical-align:top}\ntr:last-child td{border-bottom:none}\n.dim{color:#57606a}\n\nfooter{margin-top:48px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid #e5e7eb;text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:#57606a}\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n<div class=\"page\">\n\n<h1>EchoDraft Phase 5 \u2014 Final Re-Audit</h1>\n<p class=\"subtitle\">Third-pass audit \u00b7 29 files re-read (incl. new middleware.ts, lib/session.ts) \u00b7 <code>tsc --noEmit</code> \u2192 <strong>0 errors, 0 warnings</strong></p>\n\n<div class=\"banner\">\n  <strong>\u2713 Build is clean.</strong> <code>tsc --noEmit</code> completed with zero output \u2014 no errors, no warnings. All previously identified issues have been resolved or are confirmed housekeeping-only.\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"scores\">\n  <div class=\"score-cell\"><div class=\"score-val\">93</div><div class=\"score-lbl\">Overall</div></div>\n  <div class=\"score-cell\"><div class=\"score-val\">95</div><div class=\"score-lbl\">Security</div></div>\n  <div class=\"score-cell\"><div class=\"score-val\">91</div><div class=\"score-lbl\">Code Quality</div></div>\n  <div class=\"score-cell\"><div class=\"score-val\">93</div><div class=\"score-lbl\">Reliability</div></div>\n  <div class=\"score-cell\"><div class=\"score-val\">88</div><div class=\"score-lbl\">Performance</div></div>\n  <div class=\"score-cell\"><div class=\"score-val\">92</div><div class=\"score-lbl\">Accessibility</div></div>\n  <div class=\"score-cell\"><div class=\"score-val\">95</div><div class=\"score-lbl\">Documentation</div></div>\n  <div class=\"score-cell\"><div class=\"score-val\">100</div><div class=\"score-lbl\">tsc Pass Rate</div></div>\n</div>\n\n\n<h2>Previously Open N-Series Issues \u2014 All Resolved \u2713</h2>\n\n<table>\n  <thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>Was</th><th>Resolution</th></tr></thead>\n  <tbody>\n    <tr>\n      <td>N-01 \u00b7 In-process rate limiter resets on cold starts</td>\n      <td><span class=\"badge warn\">Medium</span></td>\n      <td><span class=\"badge fixed\">Resolved</span> \u2014 A signed <code>httpOnly</code> session cookie is now the <em>durable</em> auth guard. Rate limiting is explicitly documented as defense-in-depth only. <code>.env.example</code> and <code>README.md</code> both state <code>ECHODRAFT_API_TOKEN</code> is required in production. Missing token in production now returns <strong>503</strong> (fail-closed) rather than allowing the request through. Tested in run-phase5-tests.ts lines 118\u2013121.</td>\n    </tr>\n    <tr>\n      <td>N-02 \u00b7 Origin header spoofable by server-side callers</td>\n      <td><span class=\"badge warn\">Medium</span></td>\n      <td><span class=\"badge fixed\">Resolved</span> \u2014 <code>authorizeApiRequest()</code> in <code>lib/api-security.ts</code> now requires <em>either</em> a valid API token <em>or</em> a cryptographically signed HMAC-SHA256 session cookie issued by the middleware. Origin/Referer alone is explicitly rejected in production (test lines 125\u2013134 confirm a spoofed Origin is rejected as 401 when a token is configured). The session cookie is <code>httpOnly + SameSite=strict</code>, so JS-based CSRF cannot read or forge it.</td>\n    </tr>\n    <tr>\n      <td>N-03 \u00b7 CSP contained unsafe-inline / unsafe-eval for scripts</td>\n      <td><span class=\"badge warn\">Medium</span></td>\n      <td><span class=\"badge fixed\">Resolved</span> \u2014 <code>middleware.ts</code> generates a <strong>per-request nonce</strong> via <code>createCspNonce()</code> and builds a CSP using <code>buildContentSecurityPolicy(nonce)</code> from <code>lib/session.ts:117</code>. The resulting <code>script-src</code> is <code>'self' 'nonce-\u2026' 'strict-dynamic'</code> \u2014 no <code>unsafe-inline</code>, no <code>unsafe-eval</code>. The static fallback in <code>next.config.ts</code> no longer includes a CSP directive at all, preventing double-header conflicts. Tested in run-phase5-tests.ts lines 93\u201397.</td>\n    </tr>\n    <tr>\n      <td>N-04 \u00b7 toSafeClientError edge cases untested</td>\n      <td><span class=\"badge low\">Low</span></td>\n      <td><span class=\"badge fixed\">Resolved</span> \u2014 The allowlist in <code>lib/api-security.ts:184\u2013204</code> now covers <code>\"Server misconfigured\"</code> and the Phase 5 test suite exercises the raw-Gemini-error stripping path directly.</td>\n    </tr>\n    <tr>\n      <td>N-05 \u00b7 <code>as never</code> cast in generate route</td>\n      <td><span class=\"badge low\">Low</span></td>\n      <td><span class=\"badge info\">Acknowledged / Accepted</span> \u2014 Still present at <code>app/api/generate/route.ts:17</code>. TypeScript accepts it, there is no runtime risk (the function performs its own validation internally), and the cast has a clear comment trail. Removing it would require changing the <code>validateGenerateInput</code> signature. Acceptable technical debt for now.</td>\n    </tr>\n    <tr>\n      <td>N-06 \u00b7 <code>void samples</code> unused-param workaround</td>\n      <td><span class=\"badge low\">Low</span></td>\n      <td><span class=\"badge info\">Acknowledged / Accepted</span> \u2014 Still present at <code>lib/gemini.ts:110</code> with a comment. Harmless; kept for signature stability. No runtime impact.</td>\n    </tr>\n  </tbody>\n</table>\n\n\n<h2>Still Open \u2014 Housekeeping Only</h2>\n\n<div class=\"finding\">\n  <div class=\"finding-head\">\n    <span class=\"badge low\">Low</span>\n    <span class=\"finding-title\">L-03 \u00b7 Phase preview HTML files in repository root</span>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"finding-body\">\n    <p><code>design-preview.html</code>, <code>phase3-preview.html</code>, <code>phase4-preview.html</code>, <code>phase5-preview.html</code> are still committed. No security or functional impact \u2014 they contain only static HTML. Remove with <code>git rm design-preview.html phase3-preview.html phase4-preview.html phase5-preview.html</code> when convenient.</p>\n    <p class=\"meta\">Evidence: directory listing</p>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"finding\">\n  <div class=\"finding-head\">\n    <span class=\"badge low\">Low</span>\n    <span class=\"finding-title\">L-08 \u00b7 <code>tsconfig.tsbuildinfo</code> tracked by git</span>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"finding-body\">\n    <p><code>*.tsbuildinfo</code> is in <code>.gitignore</code> but the existing committed copy was not removed from git tracking. Run <code>git rm --cached tsconfig.tsbuildinfo</code> once to untrack it. No security or build impact.</p>\n    <p class=\"meta\">Evidence: directory listing</p>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<h2>New Findings \u2014 This Pass</h2>\n\n<div class=\"finding\">\n  <div class=\"finding-head\">\n    <span class=\"badge low\">Low</span>\n    <span class=\"finding-title\">F-01 \u00b7 Middleware emits <code>X-EchoDraft-Config: missing-ECHODRAFT_API_TOKEN</code> header in production when token is absent</span>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"finding-body\">\n    <p><strong>Location:</strong> <code>middleware.ts:79</code></p>\n    <p>If <code>ECHODRAFT_API_TOKEN</code> is missing in production, the middleware sets a custom response header <code>X-EchoDraft-Config: missing-ECHODRAFT_API_TOKEN</code>. This header is visible to any browser inspecting the network tab or to any HTTP scanner, effectively advertising the misconfiguration to the world. A silent server-side warning log would be safer.</p>\n    <p class=\"meta\">Evidence: middleware.ts line 79</p>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"finding\">\n  <div class=\"finding-head\">\n    <span class=\"badge low\">Low</span>\n    <span class=\"finding-title\">F-02 \u00b7 No <code>matcher</code> excludes the middleware from running on <code>/api/</code> routes served by Edge workers</span>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"finding-body\">\n    <p><strong>Location:</strong> <code>middleware.ts:124\u2013126</code></p>\n    <p>The <code>config.matcher</code> correctly excludes static assets (<code>_next/static</code>, <code>_next/image</code>, <code>favicon.ico</code>). However, the middleware also runs on every <code>/api/*</code> route, which is intentional (it sets the nonce header and session cookie check). This is fine, but it means every API POST also triggers the cookie-refresh logic. That branch correctly short-circuits for <code>/api/</code> paths (<code>line 67: if (!pathname.startsWith(\"/api/\"))</code>), so this is informational only \u2014 no double-write occurs.</p>\n    <p class=\"meta\">Evidence: middleware.ts lines 67, 124\u2013126</p>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"finding\">\n  <div class=\"finding-head\">\n    <span class=\"badge low\">Low</span>\n    <span class=\"finding-title\">F-03 \u00b7 <code>lib/session.ts</code> uses <code>btoa</code> / <code>atob</code> \u2014 unavailable in some Node 16 environments</span>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"finding-body\">\n    <p><strong>Location:</strong> <code>lib/session.ts:43, 50</code></p>\n    <p><code>btoa</code> and <code>atob</code> are global in browsers and Node 18+, but not in Node 16. The project targets Node via Next.js 15 (which requires Node 18+), so this is safe. Flagged only in case the project is ever tested under Node 16.</p>\n    <p class=\"meta\">Evidence: lib/session.ts:43,50 \u00b7 package.json (next@^15 requires Node 18+)</p>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n<h2>\u2705 New Positive Additions This Pass</h2>\n<table>\n  <thead><tr><th>What</th><th>Location</th></tr></thead>\n  <tbody>\n    <tr><td>Signed httpOnly session cookie issued by Edge middleware on page load \u2014 browser auth that cannot be forged via Origin spoofing</td><td>middleware.ts:67\u201381 \u00b7 lib/session.ts:92\u2013113</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>Timing-safe string comparison for API token (<code>timingSafeStringEqual</code>) prevents timing-based token guessing</td><td>lib/api-security.ts:66\u201371</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>Fail-closed production guard \u2014 missing <code>ECHODRAFT_API_TOKEN</code> returns 503, not a silent pass-through</td><td>lib/api-security.ts:99\u2013105</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>HSTS header added for production (<code>max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload</code>)</td><td>middleware.ts:111\u2013113</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>CORS preflight explicitly blocked for cross-origin OPTIONS requests to <code>/api/*</code></td><td>middleware.ts:25\u201351</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>Nonce-based CSP \u2014 <code>script-src 'self' 'nonce-\u2026' 'strict-dynamic'</code> \u2014 no unsafe-inline / unsafe-eval</td><td>lib/session.ts:117\u2013135 \u00b7 middleware.ts:21\u201322</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>Session HMAC-SHA256 using Web Crypto (Edge-safe) with expiry + nonce to prevent replay</td><td>lib/session.ts:60\u2013114</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>Full test coverage of all three auth paths (token, session cookie, fail-closed) in run-phase5-tests.ts</td><td>run-phase5-tests.ts:99\u2013167</td></tr>\n    <tr><td><code>authorizeApiRequest</code> is now <code>async</code>, correctly awaited in all three routes</td><td>app/api/*/route.ts line 7</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>Session cookie uses <code>SameSite=strict + httpOnly + Secure (prod)</code> \u2014 defence against CSRF and XSS cookie theft</td><td>lib/session.ts:28\u201336</td></tr>\n  </tbody>\n</table>\n\n\n<h2>\ud83d\udccb Complete Issue Register \u2014 Final State</h2>\n<table>\n  <thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>Status</th><th>Title</th></tr></thead>\n  <tbody>\n    <tr><td>C-01\u2026C-03</td><td><span class=\"badge fixed\">Fixed</span></td><td>Build errors + missing auth (resolved audit 2)</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>C-04</td><td><span class=\"badge warn\">Unverifiable</span></td><td>.env file exists \u2014 content unreadable. Rotate key if real credentials were stored.</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>H-01\u2026H-08</td><td><span class=\"badge fixed\">Fixed</span></td><td>Rate limit, error sanitisation, tests, CSP, CORS, injection (resolved audit 2)</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>M-01\u2026M-11</td><td><span class=\"badge fixed\">Fixed</span></td><td>All medium issues (resolved audit 2)</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>L-01,02,04,05,06,07</td><td><span class=\"badge fixed\">Fixed</span></td><td>Low/accessibility items (resolved audit 2)</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>N-01</td><td><span class=\"badge fixed\">Fixed</span></td><td>Rate-limit cold-start \u2192 durable session cookie + fail-closed</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>N-02</td><td><span class=\"badge fixed\">Fixed</span></td><td>Origin spoofing \u2192 signed session cookie required in production</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>N-03</td><td><span class=\"badge fixed\">Fixed</span></td><td>unsafe-inline/eval \u2192 per-request nonce CSP via middleware</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>N-04</td><td><span class=\"badge fixed\">Fixed</span></td><td>toSafeClientError test coverage expanded</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>N-05</td><td><span class=\"badge info\">Accepted</span></td><td><code>as never</code> cast in generate route \u2014 zero runtime risk</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>N-06</td><td><span class=\"badge info\">Accepted</span></td><td><code>void samples</code> unused-param note \u2014 zero runtime risk</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>L-03</td><td><span class=\"badge low\">Open</span></td><td>Preview HTML files in repo root \u2014 housekeeping only</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>L-08</td><td><span class=\"badge low\">Open</span></td><td>tsconfig.tsbuildinfo tracked by git \u2014 housekeeping only</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>F-01</td><td><span class=\"badge low\">New \u00b7 Low</span></td><td>Misconfiguration header visible in response \u2014 use server log instead</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>F-02</td><td><span class=\"badge low\">New \u00b7 Info</span></td><td>Middleware runs on /api/ \u2014 correct and intentional, no action needed</td></tr>\n    <tr><td>F-03</td><td><span class=\"badge low\">New \u00b7 Info</span></td><td>btoa/atob requires Node 18+ \u2014 already required by Next.js 15</td></tr>\n  </tbody>\n</table>\n\n\n<h2>\ud83d\udcca Executive Summary</h2>\n<p style=\"font-size:13px;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:10px\">\nAll previously raised Critical, High, Medium, and Low issues have been resolved. The three Medium N-series issues from the second audit have been fully addressed with substantial new infrastructure: a signed session cookie system backed by HMAC-SHA256 (Web Crypto, edge-safe), a fail-closed production guard, per-request nonce CSP via Edge middleware, timing-safe token comparison, and HSTS.\n</p>\n<p style=\"font-size:13px;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:10px\">\n<code>tsc --noEmit</code> exits clean with zero output. All four test suites compile and cover the new auth, session, and CSP behaviour with concrete assertions.\n</p>\n<p style=\"font-size:13px;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:10px\">\nThe only unresolved items are: two housekeeping tasks (L-03, L-08), two accepted code-style decisions (N-05, N-06), one unverifiable security item (C-04 \u2014 the <code>.env</code> file whose content cannot be read), and three new minor/informational findings (F-01, F-02, F-03) \u2014 none of which block production deployment.\n</p>\n<p style=\"font-size:13px;line-height:1.8\">\n<strong>The application is production-ready provided: (1) <code>ECHODRAFT_API_TOKEN</code> is set, (2) the <code>.env</code> key is rotated if real credentials were ever stored there, and (3) the two housekeeping git tasks are run when convenient.</strong>\n</p>\n\n<footer>Made with IBM Bob</footer>\n</div>\n</body>\n</html>\n",

      }
